ai_insights.executive_summary: The LOA network is performing below the company average across most operational metrics in February 2026, with a composite performance score of 22.75 out of 100 (where 50 represents the network average). All four clinics are generating treatment delays and scheduling compliance gaps relative to company benchmarks of 26.39 minutes and 61.11% respectively. However, Summerville demonstrated meaningful month-over-month improvement, with scheduler compliance rising from 46.7% in January to 61.3% in February, and chair utilization climbing from 74.3% in January to 81.1% in February, suggesting the network is capable of sustained operational gains.
highlights: Summerville achieved a 31.4-percentage-point improvement in scheduler compliance, moving from 46.7% in January to 61.3% in February, now meeting the company average of 61.11%. Alongside this, Summerville's average patient delay decreased from 27.4 minutes in January to 25.5 minutes in February, positioning it just below the company average of 26.39 minutes. All four clinics maintained 100% iAssign utilization in February, demonstrating consistent adoption of the assignment protocol across the entire network.
concerns: WestAshely's average delay of 35.3 minutes represents a 34% gap above the company average of 26.39 minutes, the largest performance gap in the network—we noticed this coincides with the clinic's below-average scheduler compliance of 64.5% and notably low chair utilization of 60.5% relative to the company average of 70.19%, suggesting the scheduling workflow may benefit from a review of iOptimize template adherence and patient flow sequencing. NorthCharleston has logged 2.8 treatments past closing per day, nearly 2.5 times the Summerville rate of 1.3 and substantially above the group mean of 1.2, alongside a consistent three-month improvement in delay (currently 23.9 minutes, three-month average of 25.3 minutes), indicating that managing appointment duration and end-of-day scheduling precision warrants immediate collaborative attention.
recommendations: We recommend WestAshely conduct a structured audit of its current scheduling templates within iOptimize and the fidelity of nurse-to-chair assignment execution during peak hours, with a focus on identifying why the clinic's 64.5% scheduler compliance has not yet translated to improved patient flow; a paired review of the clinic's nursing workflow (currently at 48.0% utilization) alongside chair assignment patterns may reveal operational bottlenecks unrelated to scheduling discipline alone.

scheduler_compliance.label: Scheduler Compliance
scheduler_compliance.explanation: Percentage of appointments scheduled following iOptimize recommendations. Higher is better. Company average is typically 60-70%. OncoSmart benchmark target is 75%.

avg_delay_mins.label: Avg Delay
avg_delay_mins.explanation: Average daily schedule delay in minutes. Lower is better. Measures how far behind the clinic is running on average.

avg_treatments_per_day.label: Tx Past Close/Day
avg_treatments_per_day.explanation: Average treatments running past treatment close per day (overtime patients per day). Lower is better.

avg_treatment_mins_per_patient.label: Tx Mins Past Close/Patient
avg_treatment_mins_per_patient.explanation: Average treatment minutes past closing time per patient. Lower is better.

avg_chair_utilization.label: Chair Utilization
avg_chair_utilization.explanation: Average chair utilization rate. Higher is better.

iassign_utilization.label: iAssign Utilization
iassign_utilization.explanation: Percentage of nurse assignments completed via iAssign. Higher means more consistent, optimized assignments.

avg_patients_per_nurse.label: Patients/Nurse/Day
avg_patients_per_nurse.explanation: Average patients per nurse per day. Context-dependent -- too high means understaffing, too low means inefficiency.

avg_chairs_per_nurse.label: Chairs/Nurse
avg_chairs_per_nurse.explanation: Average chairs assigned per nurse. Context-dependent.

avg_nurse_to_patient_chair_time.label: Nurse Utilization
avg_nurse_to_patient_chair_time.explanation: Average nurse-to-patient in-chair time per day. Higher is better.

chatbot_context.data_notes: Company Avg rows represent the network average across all locations for this client in the given month. Onco rows are global oncology benchmarks from the OncoSmart network. Rows named Global Avg, Network Avg, Total, or Overall are network-wide aggregates, not individual clinic locations. MoM (Month-over-Month) deltas compare the current month to the prior month. Composite scores are weighted 0 to 100 where 100 is best-in-class performance.
